title: What's new with data agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech presented new capabilities for data analytics agents, including the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. These tools enable building custom agents grounded in enterprise data and are accessible via Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs like VSCode.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through new capabilities for data analytics agents, centered on the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. The session shows how these tools support building custom agents grounded in enterprise data. Access runs through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs such as VSCode, which matters for embedding agent workflows into existing developer environments rather than separate interfaces.
